text: Moving from a sterile, quiet corridor toward a vibrant and stimulating exhibition space, I feel a shift within myself. The transition from the emptiness of the hallway to the rich textures of the R+D wall draws me out of solitude and into curiosity. I feel a stirring interest, an urge to engage, to learn, and to reflect on the possibilities of human and machine coexistence. There is excitement in the air—blended with a lingering sense of uncertainty, as if I’m crossing a threshold into the unknown.
